message:
feat(analytics,storage,search): normalize filter inputs, wire workspace filters, and harden fsync durability

Analytics query layer overhaul:
- Add normalized_analytics_source_id_value/sql_expr family of functions that
  TRIM+COALESCE source_id columns and canonicalize blank/LOCAL variants to the
  'local' constant, preventing duplicate breakdowns from whitespace drift.
- Add normalized_analytics_agent_value/sql_expr that trims agent slugs and maps
  blank slugs to 'unknown', ensuring consistent grouping.
- Introduce AnalyticsTimeColumn enum and build_filtered_where_sql to centralize
  WHERE clause construction with agent/source/workspace/time-range predicates
  across all analytics queries (status, tokens, cost, breakdown, tools, scatter).
- Replace parameterized bind (?N) approach with SQL-literal normalization
  expressions so TRIM/COALESCE logic executes inside SQLite rather than in Rust,
  fixing mismatches when raw DB values have leading/trailing whitespace.
- Wire workspace_id filters through to query_status, query_tokens_timeseries,
  query_cost_timeseries, query_breakdown, query_tools, and query_session_scatter.
  Previously query_status ignored the filter entirely (_filter parameter).
- Add token_usage fallback path: when workspace or source filters are active,
  fall back from pre-aggregated token_daily_stats to raw token_usage table joined
  with conversations+agents, since token_daily_stats lacks workspace_id.
- Add query_track_b_breakdown_from_token_usage for filtered breakdowns by model/
  agent/source that can't be served from token_daily_stats.
- Wrap SELECT...GROUP BY queries in subselects (SELECT * FROM table WHERE...)
  to ensure WHERE clauses bind correctly before aggregation.
- Add analytics_source_filter_matches_key for post-query filtering of source
  breakdown rows when the dimension being broken down IS the source.
- Add normalized_analytics_source_identity_sql_expr and *_with_fallback variants
  that consider origin_host as fallback when source_id is blank.
- Simplify session_scatter mm_has_api_values check to single COALESCE IS NOT NULL.

CLI filter wiring (lib.rs):
- Add normalized_analytics_agent_arg to trim and normalize agent CLI args.
- Add analytics_source_filter_from_common_input to parse source filter through
  SourceFilter::parse for consistent normalization of "LOCAL", "  local  " etc.
- Add resolve_analytics_workspace_ids to look up workspace table IDs from
  user-supplied path strings, returning sentinel [-1] when no match found.
- Add analytics_query_filter orchestrator that builds AnalyticsFilter with
  resolved workspace IDs; wire it into all analytics subcommands.
- Normalize workspace display in analytics_build_filters with trim.

Storage durability (sqlite.rs):
- Add sync_parent_directory and sync_file_if_exists helpers.
- Call fsync after create_backup (VACUUM INTO and raw copy paths), ensuring
  backup files and their WAL/SHM sidecars are durable before returning.
- Add fsync calls to move_database_bundle and copy_database_bundle, including
  creating destination parent directories and syncing after moves.
- Make remove_database_files tolerate missing main DB (only NotFound → skip),
  and fsync parent directory after removal.

Indexer durability (indexer/mod.rs):
- Replace timestamp-only quarantine backup naming with unique_failed_seed_backup_root
  using nanos+pid+nonce to prevent collisions on rapid repeated failures.
- Add sync_parent_directory calls after quarantine moves.

Search model_download durability:
- Replace fixed ".bak" backup dir with unique_model_backup_dir (nanos+pid+nonce)
  to avoid clobbering pre-existing legacy backup directories.
- Add sync_tree to fsync entire temp directory tree before atomic_install rename.
- Add sync_parent_directory calls after successful and failed install renames.
- Improve error reporting in atomic_install to distinguish restore-succeeded vs
  restore-failed failure modes.
- Write verified marker via temp+rename+fsync instead of direct fs::write.
- Add replace_file_from_temp with Windows backup-rename-retry logic.

Search semantic_manifest durability:
- Add sync_parent_directory call on successful first rename (Windows path).
- Improve error messages in replace_file_from_temp Windows fallback to chain
  all three error stages (first, second, restore) into the error message.

Search policy:
- Add "reranker" field to EffectiveSettings output so all policy fields are
  surfaced in `cass search policy` diagnostics.
- Clarify check_budget docstring to note it targets model downloads specifically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
